recap:
# Spain Edge Argentina in Extra Time Drama

Spain claimed their second World Cup title with a 1-0 victory over Argentina in a tightly contested final at East Rutherford, with the decisive goal arriving deep into extra time after a goalless 90 minutes of tactical intensity. Argentina's defense, marshaled through a grueling match, finally broke under sustained Spanish pressure as fatigue set in during the second period of added time. The result denied Argentina back-to-back World Cup triumphs and handed Spain their first global championship since 2010.
